steps.title: Find the slope from the table
steps.content: The table gives points $(0,9)$ and $(1,64)$ for $(c,p)$. The slope is $$\frac{64-9}{1-0}=55$$

steps.title: Write the linear equation
steps.content: When $c=0$, $p=9$, so the intercept is $9$. The equation is $$p=55c+9$$

steps.title: Match the answer form
steps.content: Rearrange by subtracting $p$ and $9$: $$55c-p=-9$$ That confirms A.
